value: {"id":"pred-seed-1","prediction":"Amanda and West will still be together by the reunion. {"id":"pred-seed-2","prediction":"Ciara Miller is about to become the most followed Summer House cast member by the end of April.","context":"The internet has fully rallied behind her. She's the main character now whether she wanted to be or not.","authorKey":"betsy","showTags":["summer-house"],"createdAt":"2026-03-29T10:30:00Z","status":"pending","resolvedAt":null}

{"id":"pred-seed-3","prediction":"Bravo is going to announce a Summer House spinoff or reboot before Season 11. {"id":"pred-seed-4","prediction":"Kyle Cooke and Ciara Miller are going to become the unexpected alliance of the reunion.
